title: Learning a language abroad
explanation:
Learning a language abroad

When Marco moved to Dublin to study English, he lived with an Irish family. At first he was shy and afraid of making mistakes. After three months he could order food, make friends and understand most conversations. He watched TV with subtitles and joined a football club. Marco says the best way to learn is to use the language every day, not only in the classroom.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Read the text and choose the correct answer.

questions.text: After three months he could [*make friends|drive|cook] easily.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Read and choose the correct option.

questions.text: At first Marco was ____ of making mistakes. | *afraid | happy | tired
He watched TV with ____. | *subtitles | friends | teachers
The best way is to use English every ____. | *day | month | year
Not only in the ____. | *classroom | kitchen | street

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Read the text and choose the correct answer.

questions.text: Marco learned by [*using English daily|only reading|avoiding people].
